positive: A highly detailed, whimsical illustration of enchanted forest flora and fauna. Featuring bioluminescent mushrooms, delicate fairy wings, and winding vines painted in a soft watercolor style. Cottagecore aesthetic, deep emerald greens and dusty rose accents, maximalist botanical illustration, storybook quality.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh shadows, cartoon, digital painting, photorealism
